case_title: BLODGETT, INC. VS. ANGELICA ROOT, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BLODGETT, INC. DBA   CABLE CAR CLEANING AS TO DEFENDANT ANGELICA ROOT, LLC. DBA  MR. TIPPLE'S RECORDING STUDIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLODGETT, INC. DBA   CABLE CAR CLEANING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $100.00) SERVED JUL-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANGELICA ROOT, LLC. DBA  MR. TIPPLE'S RECORDING STUDIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLODGETT, INC. DBA   CABLE CAR CLEANING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGELICA ROOT, LLC. DBA  MR. TIPPLE'S RECORDING STUDIO $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,950.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BLODGETT INC. IS PRESENT ANDREW HART OWNER. DEFENDANT ANGELICA ROOT LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II ALLOWS SERVICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
